note: New Hampshire has no national chain truck stops on its interstates. The rebuilt Hooksett Welcome Centers on I-93 (Irving fuel, Common Man food) are the main fuel point but have limited truck parking. Plan overnight parking in Maine (Kennebunk plaza) or at Willington CT / Mass Pike plazas.

stops.name: Springfield Rest Area
stops.notes: Northbound; truck parking, no fuel. No truck stops on I-89 in NH

stops.name: Hooksett Welcome Centers
stops.notes: NB and SB; state welcome centers rebuilt 2015 with Irving fuel, food court, state liquor store; limited truck parking

stops.name: Canterbury Rest Areas
stops.notes: NB and SB; truck parking, no fuel

stops.name: Hampton Welcome Centers / State Liquor Stores
stops.notes: NB and SB facilities near the Hampton tolls; car-oriented but some truck parking, no diesel islands
